subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself betwixt the heavens and the earth with a sovereignty that hath encompassed all contingent things, and verily, He is indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی قد ظهر بین السموات و الارض بسلطان الذی احاط الممکنات و انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @contemplation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
